title: pimelea hewardiana
intro: Pimelea hewardiana, also known as the blue pimelea, is a small, flowering shrub native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea hewardiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activity. Pimelea hewardiana is often prepared as an infusion or tincture and may also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
